zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多走势
zh.content:
当前艾达币价格维持在0.2508附近，略高于20日均线0.2492，显示短期仍有多头支撑，但上涨动能有限。日内高低点0.2513/0.2497显示价格在窄幅区间震荡，市场多空力量较为均衡。  

MACD值为0.00017且处于零轴上方，说明多头略占优势，但缺乏明确的信号线确认，市场短期方向可能延续震荡整理。若价格回踩20日均线并获得支撑，有望再次尝试上攻0.2515阻力位。  

支撑位方面，下方0.2490为近期重要支撑，若跌破可能触发空头加速。阻力位初步在0.2515，进一步上看0.2530。技术指标显示多空博弈仍在进行，短线操作需灵活应对区间波动。  

交易建议：短期可偏向低吸高抛策略，逢回踩0.2490附近适合小幅买入，突破0.2515可考虑短线跟进，但需注意仓位控制，避免追高。整体市场趋势偏震荡，耐心等待明确突破信号可降低交易风险。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Cardano (ADA) has shown modest upward momentum in recent hours, with the price holding above the 20-period simple moving average at 0.2492 USD. The current price of 0.2509 USD suggests a short-term bullish bias, although gains remain limited, indicating consolidation around the 0.251 USD region. The narrow daily range between 0.2498 and 0.2514 USD points to low volatility, which may precede a stronger directional move if volume increases. Traders should monitor price behavior near the upper boundary for potential breakout signals.

The MACD reading of 0.00017 indicates a slight bullish inclination, though the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of momentum strength. Without the RSI value, overbought or oversold conditions cannot be fully assessed, so caution is warranted in assuming sustained upward pressure. If the MACD line crosses above a future signal line, it would strengthen the case for continued upside. Conversely, a decline back toward the SMA could signal the resumption of sideways or downward consolidation.

Immediate support for ADA/USD is identified near the 0.2490–0.2492 USD level, coinciding with the SMA and recent intraday lows. Resistance is situated at 0.2514–0.2515 USD, reflecting recent highs and a key psychological barrier. A sustained break above this range could open the path to 0.254 USD, while failure to hold support could see the price retest 0.247–0.248 USD levels. These levels serve as practical reference points for setting stop-loss and take-profit targets.

For trading strategy, short-term traders might consider buying on dips near the SMA support with tight stops just below 0.249 USD, aiming for intraday targets near resistance. Longer-term positions should be cautious until a decisive breakout confirms trend direction. Monitoring volume alongside MACD signals will be crucial to confirm strength, as ADA remains in a consolidation phase with limited momentum despite minor bullish cues.
